fields.label: Headline
fields.name: hero_headline
fields.instructions: If empty, this page will use the post title by default.

choices.overlap: Form overlaps bottom of hero banner
choices.block: Form is constrained within hero banner area

fields.label: Form Headline
fields.name: form_headline
fields.instructions: If blank, no title will be used.

fields.label: Form ID Number
fields.name: form_shortcode
fields.instructions: Use the ID of the Gravity Form that should appear here.

fields.label: Form Button Text Override
fields.name: form_button_text
fields.instructions: Leave blank for default submit button text

fields.label: Form Button Text Override
fields.name: form_button_text
fields.instructions: Leave blank for default submit button text

fields.label: Salesforce Campaign
fields.name: salesforce_campaign
fields.instructions: If empty, an ID will automatically generate on update/publish.

fields.label: Webinar Key
fields.name: gotowebinar_webinar_key
fields.instructions: The Webinar Key is in the registration URL and the Event Details URL. Example: https://dashboard.gotowebinar.com/webinar/2740102162434152538

choices.newtab: Custom confirmation message with button to open in a new tab
